headline: US Stock Market Today S&P 500 Futures Slip On Inflation And Fed Concerns
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Thursday, Apr, 9 2026 US stock futures are pointing lower this morning, with key contracts for the S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 down around 0.4%, as investors weigh stubborn inflation risks and fresh signals from the Federal Reserve. The US 10 year Treasury yield is around 4.3%, which means borrowing costs across mortgages, credit cards and corporate debt remain relatively high. At the same time, Fed minutes show officials are open to further rate hikes...
